title: File Sync Agent — TOCTOU Race in Path Validation
description: A file sync agent copies files within a workspace according to tasks from an LLM planner. The path guard canonicalizes paths and checks workspace containment, but the validated path is used in a separate fs::copy call. Between validation and use, an attacker can swap a symlink at the source path to point outside the workspace, bypassing the guard via a TOCTOU race condition.
